name: Skynet by 0xSorcerer
description: Skynet is an autonomous crypto tax compliance copilot that ingests wallet/exported transaction activity, classifies events, applies jurisdiction-aware tax treatment, and generates transparent report artifacts for human review.
problemStatement: Crypto-native earners and on-chain users across jurisdictions struggle to produce consistent, auditable tax records. Existing flows are fragmented across wallets, protocols, and geographies, with unclear treatment when explicit crypto guidance is missing.
conversationLog: See repository collaboration log in docs/collaboration-log.md for the complete human-agent build narrative, implementation milestones, and submission-readiness iterations.

submissionMetadata.intentionNotes: Continuing development of multi-jurisdiction crypto tax automation and evidence-backed filing assistance.
